Expertise

Where ITSM, Operations,
and Delivery Converge.

Most IT professionals pick one lane. I have spent 16 years mastering the intersections between them — and that is where the most complex problems get solved.

01

ITSM & ITIL Governance

Lifecycle ownership across Incident, Problem, Change, Major Incident, CMDB, and CSI. Process frameworks that drive measurable outcomes — fewer SLA breaches, faster MTTR, root causes that stay resolved.

ITIL V3/V4Major IncidentProblem MgmtCSIServiceNowKEDB
02

Regional IT Operations

End-to-end IT ownership across multi-country environments. Infrastructure, EUC, endpoint management, vendor governance, budget accountability — 24 sites across 7 GCC markets at 99.9% uptime.

Multi-countryVendor MgmtBudgetEUCCisco MerakiAzure
03

IT Project Delivery

65+ technology rollouts — store openings, Oracle XStore migrations, Azure transitions, RFID and clienteling deployments — from scoping through go-live cutover. Every one delivered on time, zero business disruption.

Oracle XStorePMPStore RolloutsZero DowntimeCegid POS

+ Data & Decision Science

Advanced Certification from IIT Delhi (2025). Applying ISM, AHP, and DEMATEL for advanced root cause analysis, predictive service analytics and intelligent automation — turning data into decisions, not just dashboards.

IIT Delhi · 2025ISM / DEMATEL / AHPPowerBIPythonPredictive AnalyticsAI Tools
Career

16 Years. Five Roles.
One Continuous Thread.

ITSM discipline built at Valtech. Regional scale earned at LV. Data dimension added last. Every role made the next one possible.

⭐ Flagship Role
Aug 2019 — Oct 2024 · 5 Years
Louis Vuitton (LVMH Group)
Regional IT Manager, Middle East · Dubai, UAE
Owned end-to-end IS&T operations across 24 retail sites in 7 GCC countries — reporting to Paris IS&T leadership and regional CFO. Accountable for the full IS function: 25+ platform systems, regional budget, vendor contracts, security governance, EMEA-level reporting, store technology roadmap, team development, and communication strategy. Delivered 65+ projects with zero business disruption. Reduced SLA breaches 20%. Led Oracle XStore migration across 20+ sites.
May 2016 — Aug 2019 · 3 Years
NIMR Automotive LLC
System Administrator · Support Team Lead · Abu Dhabi, UAE
Greenfield IT build for a new high-security defence-automotive manufacturing facility — data centre, server rooms and network infrastructure from scratch. ITIL Service Desk cut response times 25%, improved end-user satisfaction 19% (survey-validated), achieved 100% backup compliance and 99.9% uptime.
Dec 2014 — May 2016 · 1.5 Years
MDS Computers (On-Site — ZADCO)
IS&T Project Coordinator · Support Specialist · Abu Dhabi, UAE
Multi-site Windows migration projects under strict SLA timelines. Escalation manager for critical incidents. Problem management to drive permanent resolutions and reduce repeat incident volumes.
Jun 2011 — May 2014 · 3 Years
Accenture India (Client: RSA Ireland)
Live Service Team Lead · Problem Manager · Bangalore, India
Ran structured live service operations for RSA Ireland on the Genius insurance platform (AS400). Owned incident, problem, and SR management — 2,000+ tickets/month. Chaired weekly client service reviews. Built the ITSM discipline that carried through every role that followed. Formal 20-topic handover at exit, 90%+ completion rate.
🏠 Where It All Started
Mar 2008 — Mar 2011 · 3 Years
Valtech India (Client: Louis Vuitton Global)
Zone Team Leader · Problem Manager · AS400 Developer · Bangalore, India
Led 24/7 LV North America support for a 32-person team, achieving 96% SLA compliance. Problem Manager, AS400 developer (RPGLE, CLLE, COBOL), Knowledge Management lead. Visited LV Hong Kong for onsite business requirement gathering — the retail fluency that lasted 15 years. Three LV Client Delight Awards · Valtech Ruby & Emerald Awards.

The Person

Behind the Profile

Available Immediately
"Where ITSM, Operations, and Delivery Converge — that is not just a tagline. It is how I have worked for 16 years."

I have spent my career at the intersection of disciplines that most professionals treat as separate tracks. The ITSM discipline came first, at Valtech Bangalore in 2008. The regional scale came at Louis Vuitton Middle East — 24 sites, 7 countries, a full IS function with budget, security, vendor, team, and strategic accountability. The data dimension came last, from IIT Delhi.

Since late 2024 I have been on a deliberate career break — travelling across UAE, Europe, Sri Lanka, and India, completing the IIT Delhi certification, and preparing for the next chapter with genuine excitement rather than urgency.

Kerala, India · Open to relocate
